positive: A symmetrical, minimalist illustration of a stylized cosmic forest. The scene features glowing, bioluminescent flora and whimsical, alien-like fauna—such as moth-winged creatures and spiraling root systems—intertwined within dark, stylized silhouettes. The overall composition is perfectly centered, utilizing a strong, dramatic contrast between deep midnight blues, vibrant teal neon accents, and glowing emerald greens. The style should be a blend of modern linocut engraving and clean vector art, resulting in crisp edges and a highly graphic aesthetic. Perfect for apparel printing, focusing on strong negative space and geometric repeating patterns. High contrast, clean lines, no gradients, single color palette application feel.
